questions.text: Training partners or coaches have asked me to show them a technique I just hit
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; skill-reputation item — being asked to teach is an observable social signal of perceived expertise

questions.text: Higher-ranked training partners have commented on a specific aspect of my game — pressure, guard, or finishing
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; skill-reputation item — unsolicited specific feedback from a higher rank is a memory of an event

questions.text: Partners at my level or above have sought me out specifically to roll, rather than me initiating
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; skill-reputation item — being sought out is an observable social signal, not self-judgment

questions.text: A coach or senior has given me specific advice about my game before a competition or grading
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; skill-reputation item — receiving targeted pre-competition input implies the coach sees something worth developing

questions.text: Partners or a coach have asked me to ease the intensity with a smaller or less-experienced training partner
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; partner-quality item (negatively valenced) — being asked to dial back is a concrete event that signals intensity mismatch; flagged for Gerald to review insight copy

questions.text: Newer students at the gym seek me out to roll because they feel they can learn from the round
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; partner-quality item (positively valenced) — beginners choosing you as a training partner signals perceived safety and generosity

questions.text: A coach has specifically paired me with a beginner or visitor and asked me to take care of them on the mat
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; partner-quality item — being trusted with beginners is a coach's observable vote of confidence in someone's mat conduct

questions.text: I have noticed that the same people decline to roll with me more than once, or step off the mat when I look for partners
questions.rationale: PLACEHOLDER — pending Gerald review; partner-quality item (negatively valenced) — being avoided is a pattern observable in memory; insight copy must be kind; flagged for Gerald
